etymology.description: иЋ«(иЋ«) (mГІ, "sunset/darkness") + зѕЅ(зѕЅ) (yЗ”, "feather") = decorated flag around which troops gather -> military signal
etymology.interpretation: The character йєѕ(йєѕ) (huД«, "military signal") combines иЋ«(иЋ«) (mГІ, "sunset/darkness") and зѕЅ(зѕЅ) (yЗ”, "feather") to depict flags adorned with feathers, commonly used as rallying and communication tools for troops in historical battles.
